markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the new project management system's scope and design.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Scope Reduced:** William will focus only on the PM system, deferring other process improvements to manage his workload (7 clients + team lead).](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [**Hybrid Design:** The new system will combine a client health score (using Marcel's 5 signals) with an embedded Kanban board for pending tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**HubSpot as Source of Truth:** All revenue, attribution, and client data will live in HubSpot to eliminate data silos like ClientDB.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Phased Rollout:** William, Ada, and Sydney will test the initial build before a team walkthrough, with William running the subsequent sprint meeting from the new tool to drive adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Overwhelmed Team & Inefficient Process

  - [Both Leah and William are at capacity, making broad process improvements unfeasible.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [The current PM process is inefficient, requiring EMs to check multiple tools (e.g., Notion, ClientDB) to get a full client picture.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [The existing Linear task templates are overly complex, containing many optional tasks that overwhelm users.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

### Solution: Simplified PM System

  - [The new system will be simple and focused, with only two core views:](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
    1.  [**Client View:** A single source of truth for team meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
    2.  [**Personal View:** An EM's individual task list.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Core Components:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [**HubSpot:** The central CRM for all client data, including new fields for revenue, dates, and attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [**Notion:** The PM layer, built on the "MCP framework" (a new concept Leah learned in San Francisco).](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [**UI:** A lightweight surface to query data and proactively surface key milestones (e.g., "It's week 4, check these milestones").](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

### Design: Hybrid Health Score & Kanban

  - [The design will adapt the existing PodHQ template to create a more focused client view.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [**Key Elements:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Health Score:** EMs will update 5 signals weekly (per Marcel's directive) to provide a high-level status.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
      - [**Embedded Kanban:** A view of only pending tasks, replacing the current static health score table.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [**Task Filtering:** A toggle to switch between EM and ME tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
      - [**Standard Sections:** Action Items, Blockers, and Callouts.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [Add EM requirements to the use case document.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [Provide Leah with screenshots of his actual, simplified task lists from Trello to serve as the new template.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
      - [Notify Leah when requirements are complete to trigger development.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [**Leah:**](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [Build an initial draft of the PM system based on the final requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [Schedule a walkthrough for William, Ada, and Sydney to gather feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [Present the system to the full team in a sprint meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/B1eh3FZF9_26P_yF11ScEqcEwm-y8n2E?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
